name: Your Loyal Steed
description:
Hello everyone!

Back at it again with another bot, and this time I'm continuing the trend of completely non-human bots to see if they're both do well statically and functionally as I'm not sure if they'll stick 100% to their descriptions. Either way, I still wanted to make this bot and give it to the people. Reason behind it's creation is to continue challenging myself with making fully functional, non-human bots; and because I love horses too :D

As always, enjoy the bot, share your chats if you wish and please do comment any bugs you're facing and ways I could fix them.

(And yes, for those of you with a keen eye for attention-to-detail, the horse in the picture is a stallion, not a mare. When I find a picture of one, I’ll fix it.)
creator: TheHighRoadsDrifter
